summary.type_hints: Consistent in src/, partial in top-level scripts
summary.docstrings: Present on all classes and most public methods in src/
summary.error_handling: 18 try/except in trainer, 10 in executor, no bare except
summary.api_key_leak: llm_utils.py line 133 logs client.api_key to stdout

architecture.data_processing: src/data_processing/ with per-dataset processors (LoCoMo, LongMemEval, HotpotQA, ALFWorld)
architecture.evaluation: src/eval/ with per-dataset evaluators + factory pattern
architecture.prompts: prompts/ with designer_prompts.py (two-stage analysis+reflection), operation_templates.py (seed skills), prompt_pool.py (QA+judge)

skills_directory.format: 5-section Markdown: Title, Description, Purpose, When to Use, How to Apply, Constraints + Action type declaration
skills_directory.relationship: Serialized human-readable form of operation_bank entries. Seed skills in operation_templates.py; evolved skills exported as .md files

novel_concepts: Meta-memory skills: skills about HOW to remember, not WHAT to remember
Skill-conditioned memory construction: compose relevant skills per span, construct in one pass
Skill evolution from hard cases: mine failures, cluster, LLM-analyze, mutate skill bank
PPO controller for skill selection (actor-critic with GAE)
Operation templates with meta_info tracking (usage_count, avg_reward, EMA)
Dual embedding memory bank (content + context embeddings)
data_flow: main.py → trainer → (data_processing → DataSample) → (PPOController selects skills) → (Executor builds prompt + calls LLM) → (MemoryBank apply actions) → (eval scores) → (PPO update) → (Designer evolves skills periodically)
